description_short: An ergonomic duo designed to support your posture and keep you comfortable through long sitting hours.

proprietary_tech.name: Anti-Skid Base
proprietary_tech.description: Prevents cushions from sliding off your chair.

faq_specs.question: What is included in the SleepyCat Ergo Chair Bundle?
faq_specs.answer: The bundle includes chair seat cushion and chair back cushion designed to provide complete ergonomic support while sitting.

faq_specs.question: Can I use this cushion bundle on any chair?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, it is compatible with most office chairs, dining chairs, and even car seats.

notes_observed: Bundle = [[pro-back-cushion]] (₹1499) + [[pro-seat-cushion]] (₹1874) = ₹3373 individual vs ₹3448 bundle. Bundle saves nothing on actual purchase — slightly more expensive than individual sum but listed at 40% off MRP. 10-year warranty on bundle (vs 1yr individual) is the real value-add.
